name: PokéSYNC - TF Tech
description:
A new technology has been invented, one that allows the user to find any Pokémon and transfer their consciousness and mass into the Pokémon. Lucky you, you are the first test subject.

Art and Idea by @xxsteamedfishxx on Twitter

The art isn’t limited to just becoming an Urshifu, Urshifu is just really hawt 🔥❤️ Try becoming any Pokémon

I wrote up this bot super quick so please let me know if it fucking sucks
creator: akitsune223
